sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22458" key="glwttismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλωττ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n22458.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lascivious kiss,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.131</biblScope> </bibl> (Philod., pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
